Scope.Project Name: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF ELEVATED VIADUCT OF LENGTH 8.027 Km & AT-GRADE SECTION OF LENGTH 17.551 Km FROM BENNIGANAHALLI TO CHIKKABANAVARA
Scope.Description: Design and construction of an 8.027 km elevated viaduct (CH: -0.675 Km to -0.050 Km & CH: 11.137 km to 18.350 Km) including ramps and formation in embankments/cuttings including blanketing, major bridges, minor bridges, RUB, ROB, ROR, retaining wall, sacrificial retaining wall, drains, utility diversions of a 17.551 km at-grade section (CH: -0.964 Km to CH:-0.675 Km, CH: -0.050 Km to CH: 11.137 Km & CH: 18.350 Km to 24.425 Km), excluding station buildings, of Corridor - 2 of Bengaluru Suburban Railway Project (BSRP) from Benniganahalli to Chikkabanavara.
Scope.Location: Benniganahalli to Chikkabanavara, Bengaluru, Karnataka, Corridor-2 of BSRP
Scope.Corridor: Corridor - 2 of Bengaluru Suburban Railway Project (BSRP)
Scope.Tender Security/EMD: Need not be paid; Tender Security Declaration as per Form (BDF/1) has to be submitted.

Contact Information.Address: #8, 1st Floor, Samparka Soudha, Dr. Rajkumar Road, Opposite Orion Mall, Rajajinagar 1st Block, Bengaluru-560010
